message:
feat(daemon): auto-import base rootfs image on startup

Check for the base rootfs snapshot at daemon startup. If it doesn't
exist, automatically import it from the configured RootfsPath. This
ensures VMs can be created immediately without manual image setup.

Also fix ImportRootfsImage path construction to create the snapshot
at pool/imagesPath/rootfs@base rather than incorrectly including
BasePath in the path.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
